title: Trying to update a SESSION RESULT with invalid data types
gherkin:
Given there exists a "SESSION RESULT" "1st place"
When the user updates the node "1st place" with the following data
  | key | value |
  | position | TEST |
  | race_number | 1234 |
  | driver_name | 1234 |
  | team_name | 1234 |
  | race_time | 1234 |
  | laps | TEST |
  | status | 1234 |
  | points | TEST |
Then the request should be rejected with status code 400
